summary: Notion AI is aggressively expanding its global go-to-market (GTM) and enterprise sales capabilities, with targeted hiring across EMEA, Asia (especially Japan), and AMER. Simultaneously, it is strengthening AI-specific security infrastructure and core data platform engineering—indicating parallel investments in enterprise trust, scalability, and AI product depth.

signals.title: Outbound Business Development Representative (x2)
signals.insight: Dual BDR roles signal intensified outbound motion to acquire new logos, especially in competitive collaboration/AI workspace markets.

signals.title: Solutions Engineer, EMEA and Tokyo
signals.insight: Dedicated regional solutions engineering capacity implies Notion AI is preparing for complex, high-touch enterprise deals in key international markets where technical credibility is critical.

signals.title: Application Security Engineer, AI Security
signals.insight: First dedicated AI Security role signals proactive investment in securing AI models, prompts, and outputs—addressing a top enterprise concern and differentiating against less secure competitors.

signals.title: Sales Manager, Asia and Enterprise Sales Leader
signals.insight: Senior leadership hires for Asia and enterprise sales confirm strategic prioritization of high-growth, high-ACV markets—directly challenging incumbents like Microsoft (Loop, Copilot) and emerging AI-native platforms in APAC.

signals.title: Enterprise Customer Success Manager, Japan
signals.insight: Localized CSM hiring in Japan reflects commitment to post-sale retention and expansion in a culturally demanding, relationship-driven market—critical for long-term enterprise adoption.

signals.title: Software Engineer, Datastore and Data Platform
signals.insight: Concurrent hiring for datastore and data platform engineers suggests foundational work to improve AI model training data pipelines, real-time sync, and scalability—enabling more reliable and context-aware AI features.

signals.title: Enterprise Product Marketing, GTM
signals.insight: Dedicated enterprise PMM signals maturation of Notion AI's positioning beyond individual users toward ROI-driven narratives for IT, security, and procurement stakeholders.

signals.title: Forward Deployed Engineer, GTM
signals.insight: FDE role indicates growing need for on-site or embedded technical support during enterprise sales cycles—highlighting increasing deal complexity and competition with deeply integrated rivals like Coda and ClickUp AI.
